message:
fix(extensions): proper semver range parsing + clippy drop tightening

Replace the stub check_version_constraint() that only handled exact
matches with a proper semver parser supporting:
- ^major: caret ranges (same major version)
- ~major.minor: tilde ranges (same major.minor)
- >=major.minor.patch: minimum version constraints
- * and empty: wildcard (always match)
- Pre-release/build-metadata suffixes are stripped before parsing

Also fix clippy::significant_drop_tightening in
cached_policy_prompt_decision by explicitly dropping the mutex guard
before using the extracted values, and rename the variable from `dec`
to `decision` for clarity with a deferred unwrap via `?`.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
